sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Pasian in ah, A Tapa hong sawl
Hong it ding leh hong damsak ding
Amah nungta ahih man ka nunna’n man nei.

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Phamawh sa keng, zong lau beek keng
Mai lam hunte a khut sung om cih thei
Amah nungta ahih man ka nunna’n man nei.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tua sangin zong lungdam huai zawlai

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Ni khatni ciang sihna gungal ah
Amah Kumpi ahih lam ka mu thei ding hi.
